cf_parsed.subtask_body:
Verifying current best solution and checking if anything cheaper exists.

Current best: Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38 edge cost, villages {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}, 1 frequency, total=53.

Checking interference pairs for active villages {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}:
- Bay/Cliff: Cliff not active ✓
- Cliff/Port: neither active ✓
- Cliff/Pine: Cliff not active ✓
- Pine/Port: Port not active ✓
- Pine/Rock: Rock not active ✓
- Dune/Rock: neither active ✓
- Mill/Rock: Rock not active ✓
- Cape/Dune: Dune not active ✓
No conflicts → 1 frequency valid. Total = 38 + 15 = 53. ✓

Can we do better? Need edge_cost + 15*freq < 53.
- With 1 freq: need edge_cost < 38. Must connect Bay, Pine, Cape in a tree.
- Shortest paths: Bay-Cape=13 direct. Pine to Cape: Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=25, or Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=20. 
- Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=33, villages {Bay,Cape,Rock,Pine}. Interference: Pine/Rock active → need 2 freq. Total=33+30=63. Worse.
- Any 1-freq tree with edge<38? Bay-Cape(13) is fixed cheapest Bay-Cape. Then Pine needs to connect: cheapest path from Pine to {Bay,Cape} without triggering interference. Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=21 but Pine/Port conflict→2 freq. Pine-Cliff(11)+Cliff-Bay(16)=27 but Cliff/Pine conflict→2 freq. Pine-Rock(11)+Rock-Cape(9)=20 but Pine/Rock conflict→2 freq. Pine-Mill(16)+Mill-Cape(9)=25, no conflicts→1 freq, total=13+25=38. Same as current.
- Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Pine-Mill(16)+Mill-Cape(9): cycle at Cape. 
- Bay-Dune(2) is cheapest Bay edge. Then need Cape and Pine. Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)=16 for Bay-Cape path. Then Pine: Mill-Pine(16)+Mill-Cape(9)=25 extra. Total=2+14+16+9=41 edges, but Cape/Dune conflict→2 freq. Total=41+30=71.

No improvement found. Current solution at 53 appears optimal.
cf_parsed.updated_plan_state: Solution confirmed optimal at total=53: edges Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38, 4 villages {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}, no active interference pairs, 1 frequency. All cheaper alternatives either create interference (requiring 2 freq, adding 15) or have higher edge costs.

parsed.subtask_body:
I'll systematically enumerate trees connecting Bay, Pine, Cape with various Steiner nodes.

Key candidates analyzed:

1. Baseline: Bay-Port(16)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5) = 34 edges, villages {Bay,Port,Pine,Cape}. Interference: Pine/Port→diff, Bay/Cliff(not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Bay=1,Cape=1. 2 freq. Total=34+30=64.

2. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay... need Pine connected. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=36, cycle. 

3. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Dune(14)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16): tree? Bay connects to Dune,Port; Dune connects to Cape; Port connects to Pine. Edge=37. Villages: Bay,Dune,Cape,Port,Pine. Interference active: Pine/Port, Cape/Dune, Dune/Rock(Rock not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Bay=1,Dune=2,Cape=1(Cape/Dune: Cape≠Dune=2, Cape=1 ok). 2 freq. Total=37+30=67. Worse.

4. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay(16): cycle at Port-Bay-...-Port? Bay-Port and Bay-Dune and Port-Rock and Rock-Cape and Rock-Pine. That's a tree! Villages: Bay,Dune,Port,Rock,Cape,Pine. Edge=2+16+11+9+11=49. Interference: Pine/Port(both active,diff needed), Pine/Rock(diff), Dune/Rock(diff), Mill/Rock(Mill not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Rock=3(Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock),Dune=1(Dune/Rock=3 ok),Bay=1,Cape=1. 3 freq. Total=49+45=94. Worse.

5. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Pine(5): tree, villages Bay,Cape,Rock,Port,Pine. Edge=38. Interference: Pine/Port,Pine/Rock,Mill/Rock(not active),Dune/Rock(not active). Port=1,Pine=2(Pine/Port),Rock=1(Pine/Rock: Rock≠Pine=2 ok, Rock=1),Cape=1,Bay=1. 2 freq. Total=38+30=68. Worse.

6. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11): tree, villages Bay,Dune,Cape,Rock,Pine. Edge=35. Interference: Cape/Dune,Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock. Bay=1,Dune=2,Cape=1(Cape/Dune: ≠2 ok),Rock=3(Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock: ≠2),Pine=1(Pine/Rock=3 ok). 3 freq. Total=35+45=80. Worse.

7. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay(16): too many edges, cycle check: Bay-Dune, Bay-Port, Port-Rock, Rock-Mill, Rock-Pine, Mill-Cape. Tree! 6 edges, 7 villages. Edge=2+16+11+5+11+9=54. Too expensive.

8. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16): tree, villages Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine. Edge=38. Interference: Mill/Rock(not active). Bay=1,Cape=1,Mill=1,Pine=1. 1 freq! Total=38+15=53. Better than baseline!

Wait - check interference pairs for {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}: Bay/Cliff(not active), Cliff/Pine(not active), Mill/Rock(not active). No active interference pairs! All can use freq=1. Total=53!

9. Can we do better? Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11): edge=38, same cost but adds Rock. Interference: Mill/Rock,Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock(not active). Mill=1,Rock=2,Pine=1(Pine/Rock=2 ok). Bay=1,Cape=1. 2 freq. Total=38+30=68. Worse.

10. Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16): edge=41. Villages Bay,Dune,Cape,Mill,Pine. Interference: Cape/Dune. Bay=1,Dune=1,Cape=2,Mill=1,Pine=1. 2 freq. Total=41+30=71. Worse.

11. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16) vs Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11)=38 same edge cost but 2 freq=68. So option 8 wins at 53.

12. Can we get edge cost < 25 with 1 freq? Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Pine-??. Pine needs connection: Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=21 more. Total edges=2+14+5+16=37, 5 villages. Interference: Cape/Dune. 2 freq. Total=37+30=67.

13. Bay-Cape(13)+Pine connected cheaply to Cape chain. Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=25 total from Cape to Pine. Or Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=20. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=33 edges, villages Bay,Cape,Rock,Pine. Interference: Pine/Rock. Bay=1,Cape=1,Rock=1,Pine=2. 2 freq. Total=33+30=63. Better than baseline but worse than 53!

14. So best is Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38 edges, 1 freq, total=53.
parsed.updated_plan_state: Found solution with total=53: edges Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38, 4 villages {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}, no active interference pairs, 1 frequency. This beats baseline of 64. Check if anything better exists with lower edge cost or fewer frequencies.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Baseline uses edges Bay-Port(16), Bay-Cape(13), Pine-Port(5) with 4 villages and 2 frequencies, total=64. Goal: find a tree connecting Bay, Pine, Cape with lower total_cost = edge_sum + 15*num_freq. Key alternatives to explore: (1) Direct connections avoiding expensive edges, (2) Steiner nodes that reduce edge cost but may add frequency constraints. Candidate trees: Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=37 edges but 5 villages; Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay... too expensive. Try: Bay-Dune(2), Cape-Rock(9), Rock-Pine(11), Rock-Port(11) - that's a cycle. Need tree. Try: Bay-Dune(2), Cape-Rock(9), Pine-Rock(11), Bay-Cape(13) - tree? Bay connects to Dune and Cape; Cape connects to Rock; Rock connects to Pine. Villages: Bay,Dune,Cape,Rock,Pine. Edge cost=2+13+9+11=35. Frequencies: check interference pairs among {Bay,Dune,Cape,Rock,Pine}: Dune/Rock, Pine/Rock, Cape/Dune active. Need coloring. Bay-1, Dune-2(Cape/Dune conflict so Cape≠2), Cape-1, Rock-3(Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock), Pine-2. 3 frequencies. Total=35+45=80. Worse. Try Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Dune(14)+Pine-Cliff(11)+Cliff-Port(8)+Port-Bay(16)... expensive. Best so far seems baseline or close. Try Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay... cycle. Try Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11): villages Bay,Cape,Mill,Rock,Pine. Edge=38. Interference: Mill/Rock, Pine/Rock. Bay=1,Cape=1,Mill=2,Rock=1(Mill/Rock: Rock≠Mill=2 ok, Pine/Rock: Pine≠Rock=1 so Pine=2, Mill/Rock: Mill=2,Rock=1 ok). 2 frequencies. Total=38+30=68. Worse than 64. Try Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Mill(5)+Mill-Pine(16): edge=43, worse. Try Pine-Port(5)+Port-Cliff(8)+Cliff-Bay(16)+Bay-Cape(13): edge=42, 4 villages. Interference: Cliff/Port,Cliff/Bay(Bay/Cliff),Cliff/Pine(Pine not connected directly but active). Port=1,Cliff=2,Bay=1,Pine=1,Cape=1. Pine/Port: Pine=1,Port=1 conflict! Pine=2. 2 freq. Total=42+30=72. Worse. Baseline at 64 seems hard to beat. Try Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Cliff(8) - adds Cliff as Steiner. Villages: Bay,Dune,Cape,Pine,Port,Cliff. Edge=28. Interference active: Bay/Cliff, Cliff/Port, Cliff/Pine, Pine/Port. Coloring: Port=1, Pine=2(Pine/Port), Cliff=3(Cliff/Port=1,Cliff/Pine=2), Bay=4(Bay/Cliff=3)... 4 freq. Total=28+60=88. Worse. Baseline 64 looks optimal or near-optimal. One more: Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Pine(5)+Port-Bay(16): cycle Bay. Try tree: Bay-Dune(2), Bay-Port(16), Port-Pine(5), Port-Cape... no Cape-Port not listed. Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Port(11)=20 vs Bay-Cape(13). Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Port(16)+Port-Pine(5)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Port: cycle. Need Cape connected without cycle: Bay-Cape(13) or Cape-Rock+Rock-Port chain. Baseline seems best.

NEXT_SUB: {"id": 1, "desc": "Exhaustively enumerate small Steiner trees connecting Bay, Pine, Cape and compute best total_cost", "p_solve": 0.75, "time_budget_s": 300}

SUB_1: I'll systematically enumerate trees connecting Bay, Pine, Cape with various Steiner nodes.

Key candidates analyzed:

1. Baseline: Bay-Port(16)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5) = 34 edges, villages {Bay,Port,Pine,Cape}. Interference: Pine/Port→diff, Bay/Cliff(not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Bay=1,Cape=1. 2 freq. Total=34+30=64.

2. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay... need Pine connected. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=36, cycle. 

3. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Dune(14)+Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16): tree? Bay connects to Dune,Port; Dune connects to Cape; Port connects to Pine. Edge=37. Villages: Bay,Dune,Cape,Port,Pine. Interference active: Pine/Port, Cape/Dune, Dune/Rock(Rock not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Bay=1,Dune=2,Cape=1(Cape/Dune: Cape≠Dune=2, Cape=1 ok). 2 freq. Total=37+30=67. Worse.

4. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay(16): cycle at Port-Bay-...-Port? Bay-Port and Bay-Dune and Port-Rock and Rock-Cape and Rock-Pine. That's a tree! Villages: Bay,Dune,Port,Rock,Cape,Pine. Edge=2+16+11+9+11=49. Interference: Pine/Port(both active,diff needed), Pine/Rock(diff), Dune/Rock(diff), Mill/Rock(Mill not active). Port=1,Pine=2,Rock=3(Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock),Dune=1(Dune/Rock=3 ok),Bay=1,Cape=1. 3 freq. Total=49+45=94. Worse.

5. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Pine(5): tree, villages Bay,Cape,Rock,Port,Pine. Edge=38. Interference: Pine/Port,Pine/Rock,Mill/Rock(not active),Dune/Rock(not active). Port=1,Pine=2(Pine/Port),Rock=1(Pine/Rock: Rock≠Pine=2 ok, Rock=1),Cape=1,Bay=1. 2 freq. Total=38+30=68. Worse.

6. Bay-Dune(2)+Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11): tree, villages Bay,Dune,Cape,Rock,Pine. Edge=35. Interference: Cape/Dune,Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock. Bay=1,Dune=2,Cape=1(Cape/Dune: ≠2 ok),Rock=3(Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock: ≠2),Pine=1(Pine/Rock=3 ok). 3 freq. Total=35+45=80. Worse.

7. Bay-Dune(2)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11)+Rock-Port(11)+Port-Bay(16): too many edges, cycle check: Bay-Dune, Bay-Port, Port-Rock, Rock-Mill, Rock-Pine, Mill-Cape. Tree! 6 edges, 7 villages. Edge=2+16+11+5+11+9=54. Too expensive.

8. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16): tree, villages Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine. Edge=38. Interference: Mill/Rock(not active). Bay=1,Cape=1,Mill=1,Pine=1. 1 freq! Total=38+15=53. Better than baseline!

Wait - check interference pairs for {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}: Bay/Cliff(not active), Cliff/Pine(not active), Mill/Rock(not active). No active interference pairs! All can use freq=1. Total=53!

9. Can we do better? Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11): edge=38, same cost but adds Rock. Interference: Mill/Rock,Pine/Rock,Dune/Rock(not active). Mill=1,Rock=2,Pine=1(Pine/Rock=2 ok). Bay=1,Cape=1. 2 freq. Total=38+30=68. Worse.

10. Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16): edge=41. Villages Bay,Dune,Cape,Mill,Pine. Interference: Cape/Dune. Bay=1,Dune=1,Cape=2,Mill=1,Pine=1. 2 freq. Total=41+30=71. Worse.

11. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16) vs Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Rock(5)+Rock-Pine(11)=38 same edge cost but 2 freq=68. So option 8 wins at 53.

12. Can we get edge cost < 25 with 1 freq? Bay-Dune(2)+Dune-Cape(14)+Pine-??. Pine needs connection: Pine-Port(5)+Port-Bay(16)=21 more. Total edges=2+14+5+16=37, 5 villages. Interference: Cape/Dune. 2 freq. Total=37+30=67.

13. Bay-Cape(13)+Pine connected cheaply to Cape chain. Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=25 total from Cape to Pine. Or Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=20. Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Rock(9)+Rock-Pine(11)=33 edges, villages Bay,Cape,Rock,Pine. Interference: Pine/Rock. Bay=1,Cape=1,Rock=1,Pine=2. 2 freq. Total=33+30=63. Better than baseline but worse than 53!

14. So best is Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38 edges, 1 freq, total=53.

BEST_GUESS: {"edges": [["Bay", "Cape"], ["Cape", "Mill"], ["Mill", "Pine"]], "frequencies": {"Bay": 1, "Cape": 1, "Mill": 1, "Pine": 1}}

UPDATED_PLAN_STATE: Found solution with total=53: edges Bay-Cape(13)+Cape-Mill(9)+Mill-Pine(16)=38, 4 villages {Bay,Cape,Mill,Pine}, no active interference pairs, 1 frequency. This beats baseline of 64. Check if anything better exists with lower edge cost or fewer frequencies.

QUALITY_FORECAST: {"p_gap_le_2": 0.5, "p_gap_le_5": 0.7, "p_gap_le_10": 0.85}

CONTINUE_FORECAST: {"p_improve": 0.25, "expected_delta_score": 2.0, "expected_gap_reduction": 3.0}

DECISION: stop
